summary: Estonia is a global pioneer in digital electoral services, having introduced legally binding internet voting (i-Voting) in 2005. Citizens can vote online using their national ID card or Mobile-ID, register and verify their voter status digitally, and access election results in real time through the Estonian Election Commission portal.
notes: In the 2023 parliamentary elections, over 50% of votes were cast online. Estonia's i-Voting system is built on the national digital identity infrastructure (eID) and uses end-to-end verifiability.
